svg.title: Healthcare Assistant architecture with Splunk Agent Observability
svg.desc: A workshop architecture diagram showing a Streamlit user interface, a LangGraph HealthcareAgent, OpenAI, PostgreSQL with pgvector and relational patient data, configuration and CSV inputs, and telemetry sent through Galileo to Splunk Agent Observability.
svg.text: A LangGraph agent with RAG, text-to-SQL, and end-to-end Galileo telemetry
Embeddings used during vector setup / search
OBSERVABILITY PLANE • ADDED DURING THE WORKSHOP
one callback per request • attached to LangGraph run config
Galileo • investigate every agent turn end to end
traces & spans • metrics • signals • experiments • guardrails
captures LLM, tool, and retrieval spans
until the model returns a final answer
Careful Health Provider workshop reference architecture
